title: BrsAPI Global Commodities Latest Snapshot (Precious Metals, Base Metals, Energy)
countries: global (USD-denominated world spot prices, not Iran-specific)
time_coverage: 2026-07-14 (1405/04/23) single latest snapshot -- metal_precious (4 items: gold, silver, platinum, palladium ounce spot), metal_base (5 items: copper, aluminum, zinc, lead, nickel), energy (5 items: Brent, WTI, natural gas, RBOB gasoline, gasoil)
frequency: point-in-time (same free-tier latest-only limitation as Gold_Currency.php; no history without a paid plan)
units: USD per unit (troy ounce for precious metals; USD/ton implied for base metals per LME convention; USD/barrel for Brent+WTI; USD/mmbtu for natural gas; USD/gallon for RBOB gasoline; USD/ton for gasoil) -- exact units labeled generically 'دلار' (dollar) in the raw feed, standard commodity-market unit conventions assumed per symbol (XAUUSD etc. are standard ISO commodity tickers).
license_terms: Free tier, up to 1,500 requests/day; used here for corroboration/citation only.
notes: None of these global commodity price series (Brent/WTI crude, base metals, precious-metal ounce spot prices) exist anywhere in CHART_REGISTRY.csv today -- the project's only oil series is iran_opec__heavy_crude_spot_price_2020_2024 (Iran's own heavy-crude grade, a different, Iran-specific measure). Proposed as genuinely-new chart candidates (status=new) in the staging file, but flagged as thin: this free tier gives only a single live point-in-time value, not a queryable history (confirmed via the Gold_Currency_Pro.php history test, HTTP 402). A new chart from one data point is not really a chart yet -- these are logged as seed data for a possible future recurring daily pull, not materialized as full charts by this agent.
